temporal_description:
(00:00-00:03) A man with a mustache, wearing a black leather jacket, is being choked from behind by an unseen assailant. His face is contorted in pain and distress, with sweat beading on his forehead. His hands are bloody and are clutching a white cloth, which is stained with blood as he struggles to breathe. (Storyline: The scene opens in the middle of a violent confrontation, immediately establishing a high-stakes, life-or-death situation. The protagonist is in extreme peril.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: Strained, pained grunts. 2) Background sounds or music: Sounds of a physical struggle, heavy breathing, and a tense, low-frequency hum.)
(00:04-00:07) The man, still being choked, looks up with a desperate and fearful expression. He sees another man in a black leather jacket standing over him. The second man looks down with a stern, determined expression, his face illuminated by a harsh light. (Storyline: A potential rescuer or another antagonist is introduced. His calm, menacing demeanor contrasts with the victim's panic, creating a new layer of suspense.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: Desperate, strained. 2) Background sounds or music: The sound of choking continues, mixed with a low, ominous musical score.)
